# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:

- name: gcp-app-stack-compute-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: global/images/family/debian-9
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default

- name: gcp-app-stack-cloudsql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      
- name: gcp-app-stack-cloudstorage
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    location: US

- name: gcp-app-stack-loadbalancer
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.gcp-app-stack-glb-forwarding-rule.selfLink)
    pathMatchers:
    - name: defaultpath
      defaultService: $(ref.gcp-app-stack-glb-forwarding-rule.selfLink)
      pathRules:
        - paths: ["/*"]
          service: $(ref.gcp-app-stack-compute-instance.selfLink)

- name: gcp-app-stack-glb-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    ipAddress: $(ref.gcp-app-stack-glb-ip.selfLink)
    target: $(ref.gcp-app-stack-target-http-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: 80-80
    
- name: gcp-app-stack-target-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.gcp-app-stack-loadbalancer.selfLink)

- name: gcp-app-stack-glb-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
